title: Uruguayan Cheese Fritters
description: A crispy, cheesy fritter recipe inspired by Uruguayan cuisine. Perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Grated cheese
ingredients.notes: Monterey Jack or Cheddar work well

instructions: Preheat the wok or a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and melted butter.
Add the grated cheese to the wet ingredients and stir until melted.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a smooth batter forms.
Using a spoon, drop the batter into the preheated wok or frying pan, making sure not to overcrowd.
Fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
